creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
found the amazing sunken shipwreck cluster in #Brisbane hosted by @australia at @tangaloomaislandresort #moretonisland ✨🚁🌊⛴️🐠✨ on a helicopter @kkdaysg 
#inpartnershipwithKKdayandTourismAustralia #seeaustralia #ComeAndSayGday 

📍discovering a hidden world under the sea by diving, snorkeling exploring the shipwrecks or get a scenic aerial view on a helicopter cluster of ships scuttled by the Queensland Government between 1963 and 1984 to provide safe anchorage spot for recreational boat owners on the eastern side of Moreton Bay. Coral is now starting to form in & around the wrecks, providing a haven for over 100 species of fish and sometimes even dolphins, wobbegongs and dugongs

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 

#dotzsoh #kkdaysg #travelwithkkday #australia #explorewithkkday #tangaloomawrecks #tangalooma
